# FastGST — Full Site Content

> This document contains the full inline content, pages, API documentation, pricing, FAQs, and policies of FastGST.in for complete, single-file LLM/AI ingestion.

---

## 1. Homepage & REST API (https://www.fastgst.in/)

FastGST simplifies GST tax rate integration by aggregating GST tax rates into a single developer-friendly REST API.

### Action Links & Portals
- **API Swagger**: https://api.taxlookup.fastgst.in/swagger/index.html (Interactive sandbox to test endpoints)
- **API Documentation**: https://docs.taxlookupapi.fastgst.in (Comprehensive integration guide)
- **ConsoleDesk Portal**: https://www.consoledesk.in/marketplace/tax-lookup-api (Manage keys and subscriptions)

### Three-Step Core Workflow
1. **Search Goods or Services**: Fuzzy-search keywords (e.g. "rice", "consulting") to discover relevant HSN or SAC codes.
2. **Verify Hierarchy**: Dig through nested classification hierarchies (Chapter → Heading → Sub-heading → Tariff Item).
3. **Get Tax Rates**: Retrieve applicable CGST, SGST, IGST rates, cess percentages, and exemption statuses.

### REST API Reference
- **Base URL**: `https://api.taxlookup.fastgst.in`
- **Authentication**: API Key passed via custom header `X-API-Key`

#### Endpoints
- `GET /search/hsn/semantic-search?query={keyword}` — Fuzzy keyword search for HSN codes (goods)
- `GET /search/hsn/{code}` — Fetch full classification details & hierarchy for a specific HSN code
- `GET /search/hsn/{code}/taxes` — Get GST tax rates & compensation cess details for a specific HSN code
- `GET /search/sac?query={keyword}` — Fuzzy keyword search for SAC codes (services)
- `GET /search/sac/{code}` — Fetch full classification details & hierarchy for a specific SAC code
- `GET /search/sac/{code}/taxes` — Get GST tax rates & compensation cess details for a specific SAC code

---

## 2. API Playground and Free HSN/SAC Rate Lookup Tool (https://www.fastgst.in/hsn-sac-finder/)

A borderless, compact Neo-Brutalist web utility designed to test key features and fetch tax rates directly.

### User Interface Elements
1. **API Configuration Header**:
   - **API Key Field**: A compact password-style input with an icon to paste and securely save keys in localStorage.
   - **API Usage Counters**: Live inline progress bars for "Today's Usage" and "Total Usage" with mathematically centered spinning sync/refresh indicators.
2. **Compact Search Card**:
   - **Search Goods Tab / Search Services Tab**: Bold borders, flat offset shadows, and magnifying search glass icons.
   - **Search Input Mode**:
     - *Goods Panel*: Keyword search and direct HSN Code Lookup (8-digit validator) aligned side-by-side and separated by a responsive "Or" divider.
     - *Services Panel*: Keyword search and direct SAC Code Lookup (6-digit validator) aligned side-by-side and separated by a responsive "Or" divider.
3. **Results Section**:
   - **Left Column**: Interactive nested hierarchy tree (Chapter → Heading → Sub-heading → Tariff Item).
   - **Right Column**: Comprehensive tax breakdown (CGST, SGST, IGST percentages, cess rates, and statutory exemption notes).

---

## 3. Subscription & Pricing Plans (https://www.fastgst.in/pricing/)

Subscriptions are valid for 30 days and are managed entirely via ConsoleDesk. All active subscription tiers feature a 99.9% uptime SLA.

### Subscription Tiers
- **Basic Plan (₹199 / month)**
  - Daily limit: 50 requests/day
  - Monthly limit: 1,500 requests/month
  - Support: Standard email support
  - Ideal for: Individuals, initial API testing, and hobbyist projects.
- **Standard Plan (₹399 / month)**
  - Daily limit: 250 requests/day
  - Monthly limit: 7,500 requests/month
  - Support: Priority support
  - Ideal for: Lightweight applications and emerging startups.
- **Pro Plan (₹899 / month — Best Value)**
  - Daily limit: 2,000 requests/day
  - Monthly limit: 60,000 requests/month
  - Support: Priority support
  - Ideal for: Growing SaaS platforms and active business systems.
- **Premium Plan (₹1,800 / month — Highest Quota)**
  - Daily limit: 4,000 requests/day
  - Monthly limit: 120,000 requests/month
  - Support: Priority support
  - Ideal for: High-volume production workloads and large enterprise applications.

### Custom Subscriptions
Custom limits, bulk queries, or higher daily/monthly quotas can be requested by emailing `twileloop@outlook.com`.

---

## 4. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) (https://www.fastgst.in/faqs/)

A categorized support library styled with high-contrast, interactive Neo-Brutalist accordions.

### Category 1: API Capabilities & Features
- **What is the GST Tax Rates API?**
  The GST Tax Rates API is a developer-friendly API that helps applications search HSN codes for goods, search SAC codes for services, fetch GST tax rates, verify classifications, and automate lookup workflows.
- **Who can use this API?**
  The API is designed for billing systems, ERPs, accounting platforms, e-commerce applications, SaaS systems, GST software developers, and custom business automation systems.
- **Why would a business need this API?**
  To automate GST classifications and rate verification. Instead of manually looking up GST data from governmental PDF schedules, systems can automate billing workflows, reducing human error.
- **How can this API help my software?**
  By dynamically identifying GST rates, eliminating manual HSN/SAC searches, accelerating invoice creation, and streamlining statutory reporting.
- **What are HSN and SAC codes?**
  HSN (Harmonised System of Nomenclature) codes classify goods, while SAC (Services Accounting Code) codes classify services under India's GST system.
- **Can I search using normal keywords?**
  Yes. The API supports fuzzy keyword searches. Searching for terms like "rice", "cotton", "software", or "consulting" yields accurate classifications.
- **Can I search directly using HSN or SAC codes?**
  Yes. If you already have a code, you can fetch its tax breakdowns, exemptions, and descriptions instantly.
- **What kind of GST information does the API provide?**
  It returns CGST, SGST, IGST breakups, HSN/SAC descriptions, structural classifications, exemption details, and compensation cess data.
- **Is the API suitable for production applications?**
  Yes. All plans are hosted in enterprise environments backed by a 99.9% uptime SLA.
- **What authentication method does the API use?**
  Secure API-key based authentication via the custom header `X-API-Key`.

### Category 2: Getting Started & Dashboard
- **How do I access the API?**
  Activate a plan in ConsoleDesk, generate an API key, and begin making calls immediately.
- **What is ConsoleDesk?**
  ConsoleDesk is our developer management dashboard where you activate subscriptions, retrieve API keys, monitor usage quotas, and download billing invoices.
- **Can I test the API before integrating it?**
  Yes. FastGST offers a live API Swagger playground for direct browser testing.
- **Can I monitor my API usage?**
  Yes. ConsoleDesk provides live metrics showing today's usage, total monthly usage, remaining quota, and plan statuses.
- **What happens if I exceed my API limit?**
  API calls that exceed plan limits are restricted until the quota resets or the subscription is upgraded.
- **Where can I find the API documentation?**
  Comprehensive guides, Swagger models, and code recipes are available at https://docs.taxlookupapi.fastgst.in.

### Category 3: Plans & Pricing
- **Which plan should I choose?**
  Choose *Basic* for testing, *Standard* for startups, *Pro* (Best Value) for growing SaaS platforms, and *Premium* for high-throughput enterprise architectures.
- **Can I upgrade my plan later?**
  Yes. Upgrades or downgrades are processed instantly through ConsoleDesk.
- **Are custom or enterprise plans available?**
  Yes. For customized rate limits and bulk data extractions, email `twileloop@outlook.com`.

---

## 5. About FastGST (https://www.fastgst.in/about/)

FastGST delivers a consolidated GST Tax Lookup API service to developers and enterprises.

- **Money-Back Guarantee**: We stand by our service. If the API fails to meet your expectations, provide a valid justification to our team for a 100% refund on any legitimate claims, no questions asked.
- **Community-First Roadmap**: Customer feedback directly influences our data updates and endpoint structures.
- **Origin**: Proudly built with ❤️ in India, working to democratize GST classification mapping.

---

## 6. Contact & Support (https://www.fastgst.in/contact/)

- **General & Custom Enquiries**: `twileloop@outlook.com`
- **Technical Support**: Subscribed developers can report issues directly inside ConsoleDesk under their active plan dashboard.
- **Statutory Billing Note**: FastGST currently operates below threshold levels without GST registration under Section 22 of the CGST Act. Non-GST invoices are generated.

---

## 7. Legal & Policies

### Refund & Cancellation Policy (https://www.fastgst.in/refund-cancellation-policy/)
*Effective Date: 16 October 2025*
- **Refunds**: 100% refunds are provided for verified technical issues or overall quality concerns. Not applicable to free tiers, fully consumed quotas, or instances of account misuse. Refunds are processed in 5-7 business days.
- **Cancellations**: Subscriptions can be canceled instantly through ConsoleDesk. This prevents future billing, but prior subscription charges are non-refundable.

### Privacy Policy (https://www.fastgst.in/privacy-policy/)
*Effective Date: 16 October 2025*
- **Security**: Hosted securely on Microsoft Azure in the Central India region. User passwords are encrypted using strong hashing algorithms (bcrypt/Argon2).
- **Data Retention**: Account information is retained for up to 7 years, API transaction logs are held for 12 months, and database backups are purged after 90 days. We never lease or sell data to third parties.

### Terms & Conditions (https://www.fastgst.in/terms-and-conditions/)
- **Statutory Disclaimer**: FastGST is an independent data aggregator and is not affiliated with the Goods and Services Tax Network (GSTN) or any government bodies. All data is provided on a best-effort basis. Statutory verification remains the user's sole responsibility.
- **Liability**: Total liability for any service issues is capped at the fees paid over the previous 3 months or ₹5,000 (whichever is lower). For free plans, the liability cap is ₹0.
